media.page_description: Add storage to host your assets on Images and Stream.
media.images_product_description: Store, resize, and optimise images. Storage is billed per 100,000 images stored.
media.stream_product_description: Store, encode, and deliver video. Storage is billed per 1,000 minutes stored.
media.plan_additional_storage_descriptio: Need more? Add additional storage below — each unit is billed at $5/mo.
media.bundle_basic_stream_included: Your Starter Bundle includes  minutes of Stream storage.
media.bundle_basic_images_included: Your Starter Bundle includes  images of storage.
media.bundle_advanced_stream_included: Your Creator Bundle includes  minutes of Stream storage.
media.bundle_advanced_images_included: Your Creator Bundle includes  images of storage.
media.current_usage_warning_combined: You are currently storing  images and  minutes of video. You cannot reduce your storage below these amounts.
media.stream_usage_exceeds: You are currently using  minutes. You need at least  minutes of storage.
media.images_usage_exceeds: You are currently using  images. You need at least  images of storage.
media.how_to_cancel: If you'd like to cancel your subscription, visit the [Subscriptions page](//billing/subscriptions)
media.plans.title: Plans
media.plans.enterprise_description: Contact your Account Manager to manage your Images and Stream plan.
media.plans.incompatible_plan_title: Get started with Cloudflare Images and Stream
media.plans.incompatible_plan_descriptio: Your current plan is not compatible with self-serve changes. Please [contact Cloudflare support](https://support.cloudflare.com) to get started.
media.plans.cancel_resizing_error_descri: You successfully purchased an Images & Stream bundle but we were not able to cancel your existing subscription. Your upgrade is incomplete. Please open a support ticket for billing.
media.billing.images.resizing_notice_tit: You're currently using the legacy plan for Image Resizing
media.billing.images.resizing_notice_des: Image Resizing is now available as transformations under Cloudflare Images. You can continue to optimize and manipulate images that aren't stored in Cloudflare Images. When you purchase Images, then you will automatically switch to the new pricing plan, which costs $0.50 per 1,000 unique transformations. Each unique transformation is billed only once per 30 day period.
media.billing.bundle_page_selection_desc: Store, optimize, and deliver images and video at scale with Cloudflare Images and Stream.
media.billing.bundle_page_existing_subsc:
You have an existing subscription to Cloudflare Images & Stream.
**You can purchase Starter or Creator bundles only when your existing subscription is canceled and has ended.**
media.billing.transformations_only.title: Images & Stream
media.billing.transformations_only.subti: Optimize, resize, and deliver media at scale
media.billing.basic.title: Starter Bundle
media.billing.basic.subtitle: Save %{savings}/month on Images + Stream
media.billing.advanced.title: Creator Bundle
media.billing.advanced.subtitle: Save %{savings}/month on Images + Stream
media.billing.included_stream_delivered: %{numberOfMinutes} minutes of video delivered per month
media.billing.pricing.transformations: %{price} per %{number} additional unique transformations of images and video
media.billing.pricing.stream_stored: %{price} per %{number} additional minutes of video stored
media.billing.pricing.stream_delivered: %{price} per %{number} additional minutes of video delivered
media.billing.features.images_and_video: Efficiently store images and videos - no need to upload duplicate versions
media.billing.features.transformations: Dynamically transform images and videos stored anywhere on the Internet
media.billing.features.vod_and_live: Seamless, all-in-one live and on-demand video streaming
media.unique_transformations_tooltip: This represents unique requests to transform images and videos that are stored outside of Images and Stream.
media.manage_plan.label: Manage plan
media.manage_plan.enterprise_tooltip: Contact your Account Manager to manage your Images plan.
media.zone.disable_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable image and video transformations for %{zoneName}?
media.zone.disabled_card_description: Transformations let you optimize and manipulate images and videos that are stored outside of Images and Stream. Every transformed variant is cached at the edge, so you store only the original media on your server.
media.zone_list.description: Enable transformations to optimize and manipulate images and videos that are stored outside of Images and Stream. Transformed media is served from one of your zones on Cloudflare.
media.zone_list.empty_description: You don't have any zones on your account. Add a zone to enable transformations.
media.zone_analytics.no_requests: There have been no Image Resizing requests in the past  hours
media.zone_analytics.error_types.invalid: Missing or invalid required arguments in {cf:image{…}} options
media.zone_analytics.error_types.source_: Download of the original image failed
media.zone_analytics.error_types.request: Request loop: the service was asked to resize an already-resized image
media.zone_analytics.error_types.invalid: Invalid image URL specified (e.g. contains spaces or non-HTTP/S URL)
media.zone_analytics.error_types.origin_: Origin returned a non-image, e.g. a HTML page
media.zone_analytics.error_types.image_t: The image is too large (exceeds 10000 pixels width or height)
media.zone_analytics.error_types.too_man: Invalid image URL specified after a redirect
media.c2pa.title: Preserve Content Credentials
media.c2pa.description: Content Credentials create a record to verify the authenticity and origin of media content. When this setting is enabled, C2PA metadata (Content Credentials) will be preserved during optimization and additional transformations will be added to the metadata.
media.origins.title: Sources
media.origins.description: Define the domains, subdomains, and paths for transforming remote images and videos on this zone.
media.origins.source.any_origin_descript: Allow source media from any origin. This may allow third parties to transform media using your zone.
media.origins.source.domain_only_descrip: Only allow source media from  or *.
media.origins.source.specified_descripti: Only allow source media from specified origins. This does not automatically include subdomains.
media.origins.drawer.description: Allow source media from this origin.
media.origins.drawer.domain_invalid: The origin domain you entered is not valid
media.origins.drawer.path_invalid: The origin path you entered is not valid
media.origins.confirm_unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
media.origins.confirm_unsaved.descriptio: You have unsaved changes. Discarding them will result in losing your progress. Are you sure you want to continue?
media.origins.confirm_unsaved.leave_page: You have unsaved changes. Discarding them will result in losing your progress. Are you sure you want to leave this page?
media.origins.confirm_delete.title: Are you sure you want to delete this origin?
media.origins.confirm_delete.description: Deleting this origin will prevent images and videos from this domain from being transformed on your zone.
media.origins.confirm_any_origin.title: Allow transformations from any origin?
media.origins.confirm_any_origin.descrip: Are you sure you want to allow transformations from any origin? This will clear your list of accepted origins and may allow third parties to transform images using your zone.
media.flows.title: Transformation flows
media.flows.description: Builds flows to automatically optimize images that are requested on this zone.
media.flows.select_flow_type_description: Choose the type of transformation flow you'd like to create.
media.flows.image_flow_description: Define a transformation flow to automatically optimize images based on URL conditions.
media.flows.provider_flow_description: Define a transformation flow to emulate the behavior of another provider.
media.flows.define_custom_flow_descripti: Define a transformation flow to automatically optimize based on URL conditions.
media.flows.define_provider_flow_descrip: Define a transformation flow to emulate the behavior of another provider
media.flows.trigger_description: Define the conditions to trigger this policy
media.flows.query_parameters_description: Use an asterisk (*) character if you want to match any use of this query parameter.
media.flows.extensions_description: Select what file extensions this flow should affect. If none are selected, all files in this path will be affected.
media.flows.paths_description: Use an asterisk (*) character to match many requests on this zone. Use * to match all requests on this zone.
media.flows.actions_description: When the conditions are met, perform these actions.
media.params.images.anim.disabled: Converts animated images to a still frame. Recommended for large GIFs.
media.params.images.fit.scale_down: Fits within dimensions while preserving aspect ratio, but never upscales.
media.params.images.fit.contain: Resizes to be as large as possible within target dimensions while preserving aspect ratio.
media.params.images.fit.cover: Fills the entire target area, cropping any overflow. Use gravity to control the focal point.
media.params.images.fit.crop: Fills the entire target area, cropping overflow, but never upscales.
media.params.images.fit.pad: Fits within dimensions, padding the remaining area. Use background to set the fill colour.
media.params.images.fit.squeeze: Scales to exact dimensions, distorting the image if aspect ratios differ.
media.params.images.fit.scale_up: Upscales while showing the entire image, but never downscales
media.params.images.fit.aspect_crop: Crops to match the target aspect ratio, but never upscales
media.params.images.flip.hv: Flips the image both horizontally and vertically.
media.params.images.format.auto: Automatically serves the most efficient format the browser supports.
media.params.images.format.avif: AVIF format. Excellent compression but slower encoding; may fall back to WebP or JPEG for large images.
media.params.images.format.webp: Google WebP format. Use quality=100 for lossless WebP.
media.params.images.format.jpeg: Interlaced progressive JPEG, compressed in multiple passes of increasing detail.
media.params.images.format.json: Returns image metadata as JSON (size, MIME type, file size) instead of the image itself.
media.params.images.gravity.auto: Uses a saliency algorithm to detect the most visually interesting area.
media.params.images.gravity.face: Sets the focal point based on detected faces. Combine with zoom to control closeness.
media.params.images.gravity.left: Preserves the left side of the image when cropping.
media.params.images.gravity.right: Preserves the right side of the image when cropping.
media.params.images.gravity.top: Preserves the top of the image when cropping.
media.params.images.gravity.bottom: Preserves the bottom of the image when cropping.
media.params.images.metadata.copyright: Discards all metadata except the EXIF copyright tag.
media.params.images.onerror.redirect: Redirects to the original source image when a fatal error prevents transformation.
media.params.images.rotate.deg_90: Rotates 90° clockwise. Width and height are swapped after rotation.
media.params.images.rotate.deg_270: Rotates 270° clockwise. Width and height are swapped after rotation.
media.params.images.segment.foreground: Isolates the subject by replacing the background with transparent pixels.
media.params.images.upscale.interpolate: Uses bicubic interpolation, which may reduce image quality
media.params.images.upscale.generate: Uses AI upscaling (ESRGAN) to produce sharper, more detailed results
media.validation.invalid_css_color: Must be a valid CSS color
media.validation.invalid_breakpoints: Must be 2 or more semicolon-separated integers
media.validation.alphanumeric_only: Only letters and numbers — no hyphens, underscores, or special characters
